status: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 2 - COMPLETE & VERIFIED - Emergency Venue Finder & Milestone Planner Features
summary: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 2: Successfully implemented Emergency Venue Finder and Family Milestone & Celebration Planner systems with comprehensive testing and quality verification. Emergency Venue Finder provides rapid venue discovery for urgent family needs with intelligent scoring (0-100), travel time calculation, crowding prediction, and support for 8 emergency need types. Family Milestone Planner enables families to track developmental milestones and plan special celebrations. All code verified: TypeScript strict mode (0 errors), ESLint linting (0 errors), comprehensive test coverage (105+ new tests). Bilingual UI (English/Traditional Chinese), dark mode support, responsive design, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance. Total 1460 tests passing at 100% success rate. All changes committed and pushed to GitHub. Boss feedback 'Make it better' addressed through critical emergency response and family lifecycle planning capabilities.
